default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Reset content strategy to increase shipping velocity and impact.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Workflow:** Adopt a "brief-first" model. GrowthX will create a \~0.5-page brief for approval before writing the full post, ensuring alignment on the story arc and tone upfront.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [**LinkedIn-First Cadence:** Prioritize short, visual LinkedIn posts (1x/week) for faster review and higher impact. Successful posts can be expanded into Substack articles (1x/bi-weekly).](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**Defined Voice:** Posts must be short, candid, and impactful, using a signature structure: a controversial hook, a personal story, and a prediction.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**First Topics:** The "Equity Multiplier Formula" and "Three-Bin Circle of Advisory" will be the first topics, with a target to post the first LinkedIn piece next Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Low Velocity & Impact

  - [**Core Issue:** Large, full-length articles create review bottlenecks, leading to lost momentum and low shipping velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [**Goal:** Shift from strategy debates to execution, focusing on shipping content that builds team confidence and impact.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

### Solution: New Workflow & Cadence

  - [**Brief-First Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [GrowthX will create a \~0.5-page brief for review before writing the full post.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [**Why:** This ensures alignment on the story arc, tone, and key points upfront, reducing major revisions later.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [**LinkedIn-First Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**LinkedIn:** 1 post/week.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
      - [**Substack:** 1 article/bi-weekly, based on successful LinkedIn posts.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Why:** Short-form content is faster to review and has a higher effort-to-impact ratio on LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

### Solution: Defined Voice & Visuals

  - [**Post Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Controversial hook](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Personal story](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Prediction](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Tone:** Short, candid, impactful, and synthetic.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [**Visuals:** GrowthX will create custom graphics (infographics, diagrams) to increase engagement, using new AI capabilities (e.g., Nano Banana).](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)

### First Topics & Timeline

      - [**Why:** This visual illustrates the "bell curve" of optimal equity value vs. risk, peaking at the Series B stage, and is central to the personal story.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

      - [**Thurs:** Target date to post the first LinkedIn piece.](https://fathom.video/share/ab2V21NfEfZraqyF7oJzJxdbPcD2XfMv?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
